summary: Phone Search Feature Testing Complete - All backend API tests pass (17/17). Frontend UI verification confirms phone search working correctly with proper placeholder text and search results.

search_full_phone_with_plus.details: Search by +393276106073 returns correct user 'Hannan Mohammad Abdul'
search_full_phone_with_plus.verified_via: Backend API test + Frontend UI screenshot

search_partial_digits_last_4.details: Search by '6073' returns users with matching phone digits

search_partial_digits_first_3.details: Search by '327' (area code digits) works without errors

search_formatted_phone_with_spaces.details: Search by '+39 327' handles spaces in phone number

users_without_phone_no_error.details: Users with null/missing phone field don't cause search errors

pagination_without_search.details: Pagination works correctly when not searching (Page 1 of 2)
pagination_without_search.verified_via: Backend API test + Frontend UI screenshot

filters_work_with_phone_search.details: Filters (Status, Role, Tax Hold, Notes) can be combined with phone search
filters_work_with_phone_search.verified_via: Backend API test + Frontend visible filters

clear_search_restores_list.details: Empty search returns paginated user list

special_chars_escaped.details: Special regex chars (+, ., *, ?) are safely escaped using re.escape()

placeholder_text_updated.details: Search placeholder shows 'Search by name, email, or phone...'

phone_column_displayed.details: PHONE column visible in Users table with phone numbers displayed

no_console_errors.details: No JavaScript console errors during testing

changes: Added phone field to $or query conditions with regex search
Added digits-only normalization for phone matching (when >=4 digits)
Used re.escape() for safe regex handling of special chars like +
Phone field returned in user response (line 1819)

frontend_changes.placeholder_text: Search by name, email, or phone...
changes: Updated applyFilters to include phone matching
Added digits-only matching for partial phone search
Updated placeholder text to mention phone search

critical_code_review_comments: Phone search implementation follows MongoDB best practices with regex escaping
Digit normalization (>=4 digits) allows flexible phone format matching
Frontend client-side filter mirrors backend logic for consistency
Phone field properly handles null/undefined for legacy users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone search feature added to admin Users. Backend searches phone field with regex, supports partial digit matching (>=4 digits). Frontend placeholder updated to 'Search by name, email, or phone...'. Test users with phones: Hannan (+393276106073), Luca (+393398200965). All 17 pytest tests pass. No console errors.
